allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Python313","C:\\Python312","C:\\Python311","C:\\Python310","C:\\Program Files\\Python313","C:\\Program Files\\Python312","C:\\Program Files\\Python311","C:\\ProgramData\\Anaconda3","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Python"\) ; foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Get-ChildItem $p -Filter "python.exe" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 2 FullName } })

PowerShell($found = @\(\); Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\re" -Filter "python.exe" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 6 | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { $found += $_.FullName }; if \(-not $found\) { Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\" -Filter "python.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 3 | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { $found += $_.FullName } }; if \($found\) { $found } else { "NO_PYTHON_FOUND" })
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m streamlit run dashboard/app.py --server.headless true --server.port 8501 --browser.gatherUsageStats false)
Bash(py -c "import ast, sys; ast.parse\(open\('dashboard/app.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('✅ Syntax OK'\)")
Bash(py -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('dashboard/app.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('Syntax OK'\)")
